title: CMS Energy (CMS) Q2 Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues Fall Y/Y
text: CMS Energy (CMS) second-quarter 2023 earnings increase year over year, while revenues decline. Total operating expenses decline for the same period.

title: CMS Energy (CMS) Beats Q2 Earnings Estimates
text: CMS Energy (CMS) came out with quarterly earnings of $0.75 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.69 per share. This compares to earnings of $0.53 per share a year ago.

title: Power provider CMS Energy second-quarter profit climbs 35%
text: U.S. electric and gas utility CMS Energy posted a 34.5% rise in second-quarter profit on Thursday, helped by lower operating expenses.

title: CMS Energy Announces Second Quarter Results, Reaffirms 2023 Adjusted EPS Guidance
text: JACKSON, Mich. , July 27, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- CMS Energy announced today reported earnings per share of $0.67 for the second quarter of 2023, compared to $0.50 per share for the same quarter in 2022.

title: What's in the Offing for CMS Energy (CMS) in Q2 Earnings?
text: CMS Energy's (CMS) Q2 results are likely to reflect mixed weather pattern impacts amid wildfire-related higher O&M expenses.

title: CMS Energy's Board of Directors Declares Quarterly Dividend on Common Stock
text: JACKSON, Mich. , July 21, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- The Board of Directors of CMS Energy has declared a quarterly dividend on the company's common stock.

title: Consumers Energy Foundation Gives $500,000 to Jackson Organizations and Statewide Nonprofit Hub
text: JACKSON, Mich. , July 17, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- The Consumers Energy Foundation announced today  $500,000 in grants as part of their annual People Awards.

title: CMS Energy (CMS) Arm Launches Community EV Charging Program
text: CMS Energy's (CMS) unit Consumers Energy is on track to make EV ownership and charging stations accessible to everyone.

title: Consumers Energy Starts New Effort to Expand Overnight Charging for Michigan Electric Vehicle Owners
text: Rebates for Multifamily, Community Locations Fill Growing Need JACKSON, Mich., July 12, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Taking another step to power Michigan's electric vehicle transformation, Consumers Energy today announced a new effort to install EV chargers at apartment buildings, condominiums and overnight community locations across the state.

title: Consumers Energy Announces Changes to Government Affairs and Corporate Giving Departments
text: JACKSON, Mich. , July 11, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Consumers Energy announced today that Carolyn Bloodworth, executive director of Corporate Giving, will retire after 42 years with the company with Cathy Wilson, being named as her successor, effective Aug. 1.

title: CMS Energy to Announce 2023 Second Quarter Results on July 27
text: JACKSON, Mich. , July 11, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- CMS Energy announced today it will provide 2023 second quarter results along with a business and financial outlook at 8:30 a.m.
